text: There is a surreal tranquility in this dimly lit corridor, as if the world behind the glass glows in anticipation of discovery. The neon violet light reflecting on surfaces invites my curiosity, while the faint echo in the empty room provokes a sense of solitude. The wall text about research and development prompts thoughts of innovation, yet I am reminded of the quiet that often precedes creativity. Being here, I feel contemplative, on the threshold between isolation and inspiration.
